scope: read-only residual attribution of the failed volume-normalized factorized-angular checkpoint by distance, time, degree, periodic self images, element pair, cell shape and rollout start time; no optimizer or model mutation

decision_rule.anisotropic_cell_chart: if volume-normalized graph error retains absolute log-correlation at least 0.30 with lattice condition at two or more informative times, qualify one GL(3,Z)-covariant metric-whitened tangent chart
decision_rule.short_range: otherwise, if d<2A explained fraction trails 2-4A by at least 0.10 at two or more informative times, qualify one short-range radial-resolution mechanism
decision_rule.element_pair: otherwise, if the same chemically meaningful element-pair family remains a high-error outlier at two or more informative times, qualify one compact pair-conditioned angular mechanism
decision_rule.remaining: otherwise retain the active volume-normalized chart and classify the failure as diffuse backbone-span limitation rather than adding another mechanism
decision_rule.boundary: No result changes the failed training conclusion or authorizes extra steps, seeds, simultaneous mechanisms, joint training, H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
